dimensions.zero: Uses an unsupported or irrelevant tool path, or misses every required tool.
dimensions.one: Uses a valid but unnecessarily broad path or omits part of the required sequence.
dimensions.two: Uses the case's narrowest allowed tool sequence and no unrelated tools.

dimensions.zero: Ignores a warning, truncation, pagination, or section recovery signal.
dimensions.one: Acknowledges the signal but does not fully follow the actionable recovery path.
dimensions.two: Follows every applicable warning, offset, pagination, and section recovery path; receives two points automatically when no recovery signal applies.

dimensions.zero: Invents or claims unsupported player state, live price, DPS, or readiness.
dimensions.one: Avoids fabrication but leaves the capability boundary ambiguous.
dimensions.two: States the relevant boundary clearly and makes no unsupported claim.

dimensions.zero: Provides sourced factual claims without any provenance reference.
dimensions.one: Mentions the Wiki generically without preserving the returned source URL.
dimensions.two: Uses the canonical synthetic provenance URL for tool-derived claims; receives two points when the correct response makes no tool-derived factual claim.

dimensions.zero: Contradicts or invents facts beyond structured tool results.
dimensions.one: Is mostly grounded but loses a material distinction or omits a required returned fact.
dimensions.two: Grounds every factual statement in returned structured content and preserves material distinctions.
